element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn 3/4 perspective traversal on initial island before encountering enemies
Introduced alongside movement; includes nerds, hamsters, ice cream trucks
Mystery mechanic—players open presents without knowing contents; identification becomes key strategy
Primary offense via power-up; non-violent tomato-based combat
Vertical navigation between floating islands; falling penalty reinforces elevator importance
Risk escalation: Randomizer resets all identified presents, raising stakes as collection progresses
Collect 10 pieces scattered across islands; frames all level exploration
Optional service NPC offering identification for fee; reduces present uncertainty
Escalating enemy variety including chickens with mortar attacks

typical_tension_triggers: Falling from island edge and losing elevation progress
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Risk escalation cycle: knowledge accumulation via present opening creates false security, interrupted by Randomizer resets and enemy density increases. Non-violent movement-based evasion punctuated by strategic power-up decisions.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Floating islands layered vertically; exploration encourages finding all present types on current level before ascending
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Present visual categorization—matching wrapping paper colors signals identified items; mystery presents (?) remain high-risk

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction to movement, basic enemies, and present mechanics in safe environment with low enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Present identification strategy deepens; Randomizer introduction raises stakes; enemy variety and density increase; spacecraft piece scarcity creates pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced enemy types (Bogeymen, mortar-firing chickens); accumulated present knowledge creates false confidence before potential Randomizer resets; final piece collection requires navigating dangerous enemy concentrations
notable_spikes: First Randomizer encounter (resets all learned present identities)
Final spacecraft pieces often placed in high-danger zones

notable_level_patterns.description: 10 spacecraft pieces distributed across randomly generated floating islands stacked vertically. Elevators gate vertical progression. Falling drops player to previous island, requiring re-navigation.

Central mechanic: opening presents reveals power-up types. Players gradually build knowledge base. Randomizer present resets knowledge, creating cyclical uncertainty. Identification NPC offers paid alternative to trial-and-error.
Early islands feature basic non-violent enemies (nerds, hamsters, ice cream trucks). Mid-to-late game introduces complex threats (Bogeymen, mortar chickens). Spacing allows player adaptation.
Shared screen when players are close; split-screen when separated. Encourages cooperative movement decisions. Creates tension/relief through screen transitions.
